sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal, Arab. ضمد Syr. ܨܡܕ to bind, to fasten, kindred to the root צָמַם (compare עִמָּד and עָמַם).

Niphal, to be fastened, i.e. to adhere; in this phrase, נִצְמַד לְבָעַל־פְּעֹד “he adhered to Baal-Peor,” devoted himself to his worship, Num 25:3, Num 25:5 Psa 106:28.

Pual, to be fastened, 2Sa 20:8.

Hiphil, with the addition of מִרְמָה to frame deceit, Psa 50:19.

Derivatives, צָמִיד and-
